case_title: GERD KONSTAD VS. SUSAN GIBBS ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,820.00 FILED BY KONSTAD, GERD AS TO DEFENDANT GIBBS, SUSAN LINDAHL, WILL E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT GIBBS, SUSAN LINDAHL, WILL E.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONSTAD, GERD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GIBBS, SUSAN LINDAHL, WILL E. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE FEB-17-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT(WILL E.LINDAHL)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETUN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE MAR-20-2023 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO DEFENDANT(WILL E. LINDAHL)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER UNABLE TO FORWARD)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [HEARING: FEB-03-2023 AT 1:30PM] (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONSTAD, GERD
ORDER CASE CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) TO ALLOW TIME FOR PLAINTIFF TO FORMALIZE LEGAL AUTHORITY OF REPRESENTATION.
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE FEB-17-23 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT (WILL E. LINDAHL)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT GIBBS, SUSAN
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT GIBBS, SUSAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF GERD KONSTAD IS NOT PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SADDEK HADDEDOU (HOMECARE PROVIDER OF GERD KONSTAD WITH POWER OF ATTORNEY) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUSAN GIBBS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILL E. LINDAHL IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2023 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONSTAD, GERD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [HEARING: FEB-03-2023 AT 1:30PM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONSTAD, GERD
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(FOR PLAINTIFF KONSTAD). THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. [HEARING: FEB-03-2023 AT 1:30PM]

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO ALLOW TIME FOR PLAINTIFF GERD KONSTAD TO FORMALIZE LEGAL AUTHORITY OF REPRESENTATION TO MAR-08-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GERD KONSTAD IS NOT PRESENT, ORALLY STATED BY SADDEK HADDEDOU (HOMECARE PROVIDER OF GERD KONSTAD) VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM TO REPRESENT FOR GERD KONSTAD (VIDEO DOES NOT WORK). DEFENDANT IS SUSAN GIBBS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILL E. LINDAHL IS PRESENT (VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM). COURT DID NOT RECEIVE DOCUMENT OF SADDEK HADDEDOU BEING LEGAL AUTHORIZED REPRESENTATION FOR PLAINTIFF GERD KONSTAD IN THIS CASE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT WILL E. LINDAHL IS 8 DAYS UNTIMELY, DEFENDANT WILL E. LINDAHL WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT NEED TO RE-DO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT SUSAN GIBBS AND WILL E. LINDAHL. DEFENDANT WILL E. LINDAHL MUST SUBMIT TIMELY AND PROPER ZOOM REQUEST IF TO APPEAR BY ZOOM AT THE NEXT COURT DATE. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT SUSAN GIBBS'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT (SUSAN GIBBS) DENIED**
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$32.50) SERVED JAN-12-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LINDAHL, WILL E.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$N/A) SERVED JAN-04-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GIBBS, SUSAN
SC-109 (AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) SADDEK HADDODOU FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONSTAD, GERD
DOCUMENT REQUESTED BY COURT RECEIVED [BUT NOT FILED] FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 - ONE DOCUMENT FOR TWO (2) FILES <866375 & 866376> FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONSTAD, GERD
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF KONSTAD, GERD ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS, [EXHIBITS RETURNED TO S. HADDEDOU ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF - AUTHORIZATION ON FILE]
